The repository with the most open pull requests is **`acme/web`** with **13 open pull requests**.

**Answers:**
(a) There are exactly **37 open pull requests** across all repositories.
(b) The repository with the most open pull requests is **`acme/web`**, which has **13 open pull requests**.
